label: P&L Waterfall
description: Structural P&L breakdown with factor bars, drill-down by strategy, residual, and net total.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.8.note: Error handled at PnLDataProvider level; WidgetErrorBoundary catches runtime throws.

1.2.note: pnl-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and filters by scope.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → filterMultiplier=1 → unfiltered dataset.

1.7.note: SHARE_CLASSES/SHARE_CLASS_LABELS from lib/types/defi; no reference data in lib/mocks.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ paper ✓ batch ✓. Widget has embedded Live/Batch toggle in its controls bar.

3.2.note: pnl-data-context.tsx passes dataMode==='batch' flag into all generation functions (generatePnLComponents, generateTimeSeriesData, generateFactorTimeSeries). Mode-aware data generation confirmed at lines 201, 238, 255, 263.

3.3.note: No order-entry in this widget (display-only). N/A — no submission buttons.

3.4.note: Playwright 2026-04-21: Live/Batch mode pill in controls bar + right-aligned Live/Batch Badge (both with Radio/Database icons) confirmed visible. dataMode toggle inside widget wired independently from global Live/Batch scope strip.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget is display-only P&L view. Expected paper behavior = identical to live but sourced from paper trade data. No UI changes needed for paper mode toggle.

3.6.note: No WebSocket connections or setInterval in widget or data-context. All data is mock-generated synchronously — no connections to disable in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent-automated checks (3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6) pass. 3.3 N/A (no order entry). 3.4 needs human visual confirmation of batch badge visibility.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. All onClick handlers are meaningful: setDataMode, setDateRange, setGroupBy, setFactorView, setSelectedFactor, handleGenerateReport (fires toast), setShowAllLegend.

4.2.note: No href='#' or dead links in widget.

4.3.note: Human to confirm all control fields (date range, group-by, share class, mode toggle) are discoverable and sufficient for user needs.

4.4.note: Human to confirm: Report button fires correct toast; factor selection updates pnl-factor-drilldown widget.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No inline entitlement checks in widget render path. Entitlements enforced at widget-wrapper level outside this component.

4.7.note: Playwright 2026-04-21: factorView toggle verified — Bars (default) → Histogram (diverging vertical bars with X/Y axes visible) → Pie (donut + legend table with 14 factors, center KPI '+$933.0k NET ATTRIBUTION', Factor/Value/% columns) switches correctly without crashes. CollapsibleSection toggles still need human confirmation.

4.8.note: Human to confirm: factor list scrolls inside widget bounds; no overflow leaking.

l4.notes: Agent checks (4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6) pass. Human walkthrough needed for 4.3, 4.4, 4.7, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategy types (DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, and all others in registry). Widget shows aggregate P&L attribution across any strategies in scope — it is strategy-agnostic and serves every strategy type registered.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl color literals in widget file. POS_FILL/NEG_FILL use var(--pnl-positive)/var(--pnl-negative). CSS vars throughout.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. Reference data (SHARE_CLASSES) from lib/types/defi.

7.3.note: Decomposed to 4 sibling files (commit a4f7a76): pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx (385), pnl-waterfall-helpers.tsx (72), pnl-waterfall-factor-histogram.tsx (150), pnl-waterfall-factor-pie.tsx (281). All under the 500-line file limit; each component under the 200-line component limit.

7.4.note: All components PascalCase (PnlWaterfallWidget, FactorHistogram, FactorPie, PieLegend, FactorTooltipCard). Hooks useCamelCase. File kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML assignment.

7.7.note: useMemo deps are stable arrays/primitives. No inline object/array literals in deps. maxFactorAbs/defiPnlMax computed once at render top. Recharts event handlers cast to unknown then narrowed (no closure captures causing re-creates).

l7.notes: 7.1-7.4, 7.6-7.7 pass. 7.5 retired (English-only UI). File-level size fixed via 4-file decomposition (commit a4f7a76).

8.1.note: Multiple text-[Xpx] classes: text-[11px], text-[10px], text-[10.5px], text-[9px], text-[8.5px] used for micro-typography in controls bar and pie legend. text-[18px] → text-lg fixed would require splitting; deferred as micro-scale tokens don't exist. Requests --text-2xs (10px), --text-3xs (9px) tokens. fontSize props in Recharts tick/axis objects are API props not tailwind classes — exempt.

8.2.note: py-[3px] → py-0.5 fixed; rounded-[3px] → rounded fixed in pie legend button (line 822).

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge, Select/SelectTrigger/SelectContent/SelectItem from components/ui. CollapsibleSection from components/shared. PnLValue from components/trading. Recharts primitives are charting library, not substitutable with shared UI components.

8.4.note:
Agent: Added role='button' + tabIndex={0} + onKeyDown to factor-bar
(bars view). No without alt. No bare . Pie onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave on Recharts Pie component (library-managed, not interactive div). Human: keyboard-only + screen-reader pass still needed.

8.5.note: Human to verify at minW=4 (register.ts) and minH=6 no overflow or visual breakage.

l8.notes: 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.1 deferred (micro-typography tokens missing). 8.4 agent portion done, human walk needed. 8.5 human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Contains embedded controls bar (Live/Batch, date range, group-by, share class) — merging with factor-drilldown would create a monolith. Waterfall drives factor selection; drilldown consumes it.

relationships.notes: Singleton widget. Acts as master: clicking a factor bar sets selectedFactor in PnLDataProvider, which pnl-factor-drilldown reads. pnl-time-series is a peer (reads same context, no selection dependency).

dataContract.notes: Currently all mock data generated inline in pnl-data-context.tsx. Production: REST fetch on date-range/mode change. No real-time streaming needed for waterfall (batch P&L attribution).

gaps: Production REST endpoint not wired — all data is mock-generated
DeFi P&L Attribution section uses hardcoded category colors (cat.color from mock data) — no token for multi-category palette
No explicit sports/predictions coverage in mock data generators
coverage.notes: Widget is strategy-agnostic — renders whatever pnlComponents the context provides. Coverage is scope-gated by the global scope filter. DeFi Attribution section explicitly present for defi asset class.

knownIssues: text-[Xpx] micro-typography classes (text-[11px], text-[10px] etc.) need --text-2xs/--text-3xs tokens in globals.css before they can be replaced with scale classes.
bg-[var(--accent-blue)] on line 262 uses a CSS variable (--accent-blue) that does not exist in globals.css — rendered as transparent. Token request: --accent-blue for unrealized P&L bar fill.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx — file is 915 lines, exceeds 500-line limit. FactorPie was 207 lines (>200 per-component limit).
findings.fix: Extracted PieLegend subcomponent from FactorPie, reducing FactorPie to 158 lines. File-level 500-line excess deferred — file contains 5 private subcomponents that cannot trivially be split without a larger refactor.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx — file 915 lines exceeds 500-line spec limit after extraction.
findings.fix: Decomposed into 4 sibling files (commit a4f7a76): pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx (385 lines, root widget), pnl-waterfall-helpers.tsx (72 lines, shared types + formatSignedCompact/formatAxisCompact/FactorTooltipCard), pnl-waterfall-factor-histogram.tsx (150 lines, FactorHistogram Recharts BarChart), pnl-waterfall-factor-pie.tsx (281 lines, FactorPie donut + PieLegend). All four files now under the 500-line limit.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx — ~40 user-visible strings not yet wrapped in i18n helper.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx — text-[11px], text-[10px], text-[10.5px], text-[9px], text-[8.5px], text-[18px] arbitrary-size tailwind classes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro (0.625rem/10px) and text-[9px] → text-nano (0.5625rem/9px) using newly-added tokens in globals.css. Remaining text-[11px], text-[10.5px], text-[8.5px], text-[18px] are off-scale half-step or larger sizes with no matching token — retained as arbitrary classes.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx:822 — py-[3px] rounded-[3px] arbitrary spacing in pie legend button.
findings.fix: Replaced py-[3px] with py-0.5 (2px) and rounded-[3px] with rounded (4px). Swatch strip w-[3px]/rounded-[1px] retained as design-critical micro-dimension.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx:289 — <div onClick> for factor bar selection in bars view had no role, tabIndex, or keyboard handler.
findings.fix: Added role='button', tabIndex={0}, aria-pressed={isSelected}, onKeyDown (Enter/Space) to factor bar <div> elements.

findings.description: pnl-waterfall-widget.tsx:262 — bg-[var(--accent-blue)]/60 references --accent-blue which is not defined in globals.css.
findings.fix: Replaced bg-[var(--accent-blue)]/60 with bg-chart-3/60. --chart-3 is the existing theme blue token (#2563eb light / #60a5fa dark) — no new token needed; the original request was redundant with --chart-3.

findings.description: Playwright audit 2026-04-21: live exercise of controls on /services/trading/pnl.
findings.fix: Verified via Playwright: page renders all 3 pnl widgets (Waterfall + Time Series + Factor Breakdown). Bars→Histogram→Pie factorView toggle switches without crash; Pie hero-KPI (+$933.0k Net attribution across 14 factors) + legend table (Funding 34.8%, Carry 30.0%, Basis 15.9%, ...) render correctly. Cross-section net, Structural (Realized/Unrealized), Factor Attribution, Residual, NET P&L footer all populate. Embedded Live/Batch dataMode toggle distinct from global scope Live/Batch strip.

findings.description: Non-widget console errors observed during Playwright session: (1) ChunkLoadError on lib_registry_instruments-snapshot_json during mock-handler init, (2) Firestore offline unavailable in mock mode.
findings.deferReason: Both errors originate from global infrastructure (mock-handler + Firebase), not pnl widgets. Flagged to shared/platform owners; outside pnl scope.
